dct_title_s: Africa : With all its states, kingdoms, republics, regions, islands, & ca. ; improved and inlarged from D’Anville’s map; to which have been added a particular chart of the Gold Coast, wherein are distinguished all the European forts and factories, by S. Boulton: and also a summary description relative to the trade and natural produce, manners and customs of the African continent and islands
dct_description_sm: Torn along the fold lines into 4 pieces. There is some damage around the edges and some text is missing from the "Eastern parts" gazetteer.
dct_publisher_sm: Printed for Robert Sayer, Fleet Street
dct_rights_sm: Image courtesy University of Cape Town Libraries, Special Collections: Maps scanned under the William and Yvonne Jacobson Digital Africana Program at UCT. If you have questions, please contact David Rumsey Map Center at rumseymapcenter@stanford.edu.
